# Pull Request

## Summary
<!-- Describe what changed and why. Keep this concrete and specific. -->
- [ ] This PR includes a clear description of the change.
- [ ] This PR explains the motivation or problem being addressed.
- [ ] This PR describes the main implementation details.
- [ ] Related issue(s), discussion(s), or task(s) are linked.

**What changed?**
<!-- Example: Added a new atmosphere update rule for radiative cooling. -->

**Why was this needed?**
<!-- Example: The previous model produced unstable temperature behavior under high CO2 conditions. -->

**Implementation notes**
<!-- Mention assumptions, tradeoffs, config changes, new dependencies, or breaking changes. -->

## Tests
<!-- Testing should show that the change is correct and does not break existing behavior. -->
- [ ] I added or updated unit tests for the changed logic.
- [ ] All relevant tests pass locally.

**Test details**
<!-- List commands run, files tested, and what behavior was validated. -->

**Why are no tests needed?**
<!-- Fill this out only if no tests were added. Otherwise delete or write N/A. -->

## Simulations, examples, and observations
<!-- For simulation-heavy changes, include evidence that the behavior is reasonable and reproducible. -->
- [ ] I ran the relevant simulation(s) for this change.
- [ ] I included the config, script, notebook, or command needed to reproduce the result.
- [ ] I included example outputs such as plots, logs, tables, or screenshots.
- [ ] I summarized the main observations from the results.
- [ ] I compared results against a baseline or prior behavior when relevant.

**Simulation setup**
<!-- Include initial conditions, parameters, seed, runtime settings, and hardware if relevant. -->

**Reproduction steps**
```bash
# Example
# python run_simulation.py --config configs/example.yaml
```

**Results / artifacts**
<!-- Link plots, screenshots, log files, output folders, or attach images in the PR. -->

**Observations**
<!-- Example: Surface temperature oscillations decreased and convergence improved relative to the previous solver. -->

## Reviewer notes
- [ ] This PR is ready for review.
- [ ] I want feedback on a specific design or modeling decision.
- [ ] This PR contains breaking changes.
- [ ] This PR requires follow-up work.

**Specific feedback requested**
<!-- Mention any part of the PR where reviewer attention is especially needed. -->
